003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.HttpPartCollectionFormat.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.HttpPartDataType.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.HttpPartFormat.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ObjectUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
025
026import java.io.*;
027import java.lang.reflect.*;
028import java.util.*;
029import java.util.function.*;
030
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.httppart.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.marshall.utils.*;
040
041/**
042 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link OpenApiSerializer}.
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
045 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
049 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/OpenApiSupport">OpenApi Basics</a>
050
051 * </ul>
052 */
053@SuppressWarnings({
054   "resource", // Resource management handled externally
055   "java:S110" // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
056})
057public class OpenApiSerializerSession extends UonSerializerSession {
058
059   /**
060    * Builder class.
061    */
062   public static class Builder extends UonSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
063
064      private OpenApiSerializer ctx;
065
066      /**
067       * Constructor
068       *
069       * @param ctx The context creating this session.
070       */
071      protected Builder(OpenApiSerializer ctx) {
072         super(ctx);
073         this.ctx = ctx;
074      }
075
076      @Override
077      public OpenApiSerializerSession build() {
078         return new OpenApiSerializerSession(this);
079      }
080
081   }
082
083   private static class OapiStringBuilder {
084      static final AsciiSet EQ = AsciiSet.of("=\\");
085      static final AsciiSet PIPE = AsciiSet.of("|\\");
086      static final AsciiSet PIPE_OR_EQ = AsciiSet.of("|=\\");
087      static final AsciiSet COMMA = AsciiSet.of(",\\");
088      static final AsciiSet COMMA_OR_EQ = AsciiSet.of(",=\\");
089
090      private final StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
091      private final HttpPartCollectionFormat cf;
092      private boolean first = true;
093
094      OapiStringBuilder(HttpPartCollectionFormat cf) {
095         this.cf = cf;
096      }
097
098      @Override
099      public String toString() {
100         return sb.toString();
101      }
102
103      private void delim(HttpPartCollectionFormat cf) {
104         if (cf == PIPES)
105            sb.append('|');
106         else if (cf == SSV)
107            sb.append(' ');
108         else if (cf == TSV)
109            sb.append('\t');
110         else
111            sb.append(',');
112      }
113
114      OapiStringBuilder append(Object o) {
115         if (! first)
116            delim(cf);
117         first = false;
118         if (cf == PIPES)
119            sb.append(escapeChars(s(o), PIPE));
120         else if (cf == SSV || cf == TSV)
121            sb.append(s(o));
122         else
123            sb.append(escapeChars(s(o), COMMA));
124         return this;
125      }
126
127      OapiStringBuilder append(Object key, Object val) {
128         if (! first)
129            delim(cf);
130         first = false;
131         if (cf == PIPES)
132            sb.append(escapeChars(s(key), PIPE_OR_EQ)).append('=').append(escapeChars(s(val), PIPE_OR_EQ));
133         else if (cf == SSV || cf == TSV)
134            sb.append(escapeChars(s(key), EQ)).append('=').append(escapeChars(s(val), EQ));
135         else
136            sb.append(escapeChars(s(key), COMMA_OR_EQ)).append('=').append(escapeChars(s(val), COMMA_OR_EQ));
137         return this;
138      }
139   }
140
141   // Cache these for faster lookup
142   private static final MarshallingContext BC = MarshallingContext.DEFAULT;
143   private static final ClassMeta<byte[]> CM_ByteArray = BC.getClassMeta(byte[].class);
144   private static final ClassMeta<String[]> CM_StringArray = BC.getClassMeta(String[].class);
145   private static final ClassMeta<Calendar> CM_Calendar = BC.getClassMeta(Calendar.class);
146   private static final ClassMeta<Long> CM_Long = BC.getClassMeta(Long.class);
147   private static final ClassMeta<Integer> CM_Integer = BC.getClassMeta(Integer.class);
148   private static final ClassMeta<Double> CM_Double = BC.getClassMeta(Double.class);
149
150   private static final ClassMeta<Float> CM_Float = BC.getClassMeta(Float.class);
151
152   private static final ClassMeta<Boolean> CM_Boolean = BC.getClassMeta(Boolean.class);
153   private static final HttpPartSchema DEFAULT_SCHEMA = HttpPartSchema.DEFAULT;
154
155   /**
156    * Creates a new builder for this object.
157    *
158    * @param ctx The context creating this session.
159    * @return A new builder.
160    */
161   public static Builder create(OpenApiSerializer ctx) {
162      return new Builder(ctx);
163   }
164
165   private final OpenApiSerializer ctx;
166
167   /**
168    * Constructor.
169    *
170    * @param builder The builder for this object.
171    */
172   protected OpenApiSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
173      super(builder);
174      ctx = builder.ctx;
175   }
176
177   @Override /* Overridden from PartSerializer */
178   @SuppressWarnings({
179      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
180      "java:S6541", // Single-threaded session contexts do not require synchronization
181   })
182   public String serialize(HttpPartType partType, HttpPartSchema schema, Object value) throws SerializeException, SchemaValidationException {
183
184      ClassMeta<?> type = getClassMetaForObject(value);
185      if (type == null)
186         type = object();
187
188      // Swap if necessary
189      var swap = type.getSwap(this);
190      if (nn(swap) && ! type.isDateOrCalendarOrTemporal()) {
191         value = swap(swap, value);
192         type = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
193
194         // If the getSwapClass() method returns Object, we need to figure out
195         // the actual type now.
196         if (type.isObject())
197            type = getClassMetaForObject(value);
198      }
199
200      schema = coalesce(schema, DEFAULT_SCHEMA);
201
202      HttpPartDataType t = schema.getType(type);
203
204      HttpPartFormat f = schema.getFormat(type);
205      if (f == HttpPartFormat.NO_FORMAT)
206         f = ctx.getFormat();
207
208      HttpPartCollectionFormat cf = schema.getCollectionFormat();
209      if (cf == HttpPartCollectionFormat.NO_COLLECTION_FORMAT)
210         cf = ctx.getCollectionFormat();
211
212      String out = null;
213
214      schema.validateOutput(value);
215
216      var spt = getClassMeta(schema.getParsedType());
217      if (type.hasMutaterTo(spt) || spt.hasMutaterFrom(type)) {
218         value = toType(value, spt);
219         type = spt;
220      }
221
222      if (type.isUri()) {
223         value = getUriResolver().resolve(value);
224         type = string();
225      }
226
227      if (nn(value)) {
228
229         if (t == STRING) {
230
231            if (f == BYTE) {
232               out = base64Encode(toType(value, CM_ByteArray));
233            } else if (f == BINARY) {
234               out = toHex(toType(value, CM_ByteArray));
235            } else if (f == BINARY_SPACED) {
236               out = toSpacedHex(toType(value, CM_ByteArray));
237            } else if (f == DATE) {
238               out = Iso8601Utils.formatAsDate(value, type, getTimeZone());
239            } else if (f == DATE_TIME) {
240               out = Iso8601Utils.formatAsDateTime(value, type, getTimeZone());
241            } else if (f == HttpPartFormat.UON) {
242               out = super.serialize(partType, schema, value);
243            } else {
244               out = toType(value, string());
245            }
246
247         } else if (t == BOOLEAN) {
248
249            out = s(toType(value, CM_Boolean));
250
251         } else if (t == INTEGER) {
252
253            if (f == INT64)
254               out = s(toType(value, CM_Long));
255            else
256               out = s(toType(value, CM_Integer));
257
258         } else if (t == NUMBER) {
259
260            if (f == DOUBLE)
261               out = s(toType(value, CM_Double));
262            else
263               out = s(toType(value, CM_Float));
264
265         } else if (t == ARRAY) {
266
267            if (cf == HttpPartCollectionFormat.UONC)
268               out = super.serialize(partType, null, toList(partType, type, value, schema));
269            else {
270
271               HttpPartSchema items = schema.getItems();
272               ClassMeta<?> vt = getClassMetaForObject(value);
273               var sb = new OapiStringBuilder(cf);
274
275               if (type.isArray()) {
276                  for (var i = 0; i < Array.getLength(value); i++)
277                     sb.append(serialize(partType, items, Array.get(value, i)));
278               } else if (type.isCollection()) {
279                  ((Collection<?>)value).forEach(x -> sb.append(serialize(partType, items, x)));
280               } else if (type.isStreamable()) {
281                  forEachStreamableEntry(value, type, x -> sb.append(serialize(partType, items, x)));
282               } else if (vt.hasMutaterTo(String[].class)) {
283                  String[] ss = toType(value, CM_StringArray);
284                  for (var element : ss)
285                     sb.append(serialize(partType, items, element));
286               } else {
287                  throw new SerializeException("Input is not a valid array type: " + type);
288               }
289
290               out = sb.toString();
291            }
292
293         } else if (t == OBJECT) {
294
295            if (cf == HttpPartCollectionFormat.UONC) {
296               if (schema.hasProperties() && type.isMapOrBean())
297                  value = toMap(partType, type, value, schema);
298               out = super.serialize(partType, null, value);
299
300            } else if (type.isBean()) {
301               var sb = new OapiStringBuilder(cf);
302               Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
303               HttpPartSchema schema2 = schema;
304
305               toBeanMap(value).forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, val, thrown) -> {
306                  if (thrown == null)
307                     sb.append(key, serialize(partType, schema2.getProperty(key), val));
308               });
309               out = sb.toString();
310
311            } else if (type.isMap()) {
312               var sb = new OapiStringBuilder(cf);
313               HttpPartSchema schema2 = schema;
314               ((Map<?,?>)value).forEach((k, v) -> sb.append(k, serialize(partType, schema2.getProperty(s(k)), v)));
315               out = sb.toString();
316
317            } else {
318               throw new SerializeException("Input is not a valid object type: " + type);
319            }
320
321         } else if (t == FILE) {
322            throw new SerializeException("File part not supported.");
323
324         } else if (t == NO_TYPE) {
325            // This should never be returned by HttpPartSchema.getType(ClassMeta).
326            throw new SerializeException("Invalid type.");
327         }
328      }
329
330      schema.validateInput(out);
331      if (out == null)
332         out = schema.getDefault();
333      if (out == null)
334         out = "null";
335      return out;
336   }
337
338   @SuppressWarnings({
339      "rawtypes" // Raw types necessary for generic list handling
340   })
341   private List toList(HttpPartType partType, ClassMeta<?> type, Object o, HttpPartSchema s) throws SerializeException, SchemaValidationException {
342      if (s == null)
343         s = DEFAULT_SCHEMA;
344      var l = new JsonList();
345      HttpPartSchema items = s.getItems();
346      if (type.isArray()) {
347         for (var i = 0; i < Array.getLength(o); i++)
348            l.add(toObject(partType, Array.get(o, i), items));
349      } else if (type.isCollection()) {
350         ((Collection<?>)o).forEach(x -> l.add(toObject(partType, x, items)));
351      } else if (type.isStreamable()) {
352         forEachStreamableEntry(o, type, x -> l.add(toObject(partType, x, items)));
353      } else {
354         l.add(toObject(partType, o, items));
355      }
356      if (isSortCollections())
357         return sort(l);
358      return l;
359   }
360
361   private Map<String,Object> toMap(HttpPartType partType, ClassMeta<?> type, Object o, HttpPartSchema s) throws SerializeException, SchemaValidationException {
362      if (s == null)
363         s = DEFAULT_SCHEMA;
364      var m = new JsonMap();
365      if (type.isBean()) {
366         Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
367         HttpPartSchema s2 = s;
368         toBeanMap(o).forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, val, thrown) -> {
369            if (thrown == null)
370               m.put(key, toObject(partType, val, s2.getProperty(key)));
371         });
372      } else {
373         HttpPartSchema s2 = s;
374         ((Map<?,?>)o).forEach((k, v) -> m.put(s(k), toObject(partType, v, s2.getProperty(s(k)))));
375      }
376      if (isSortMaps())
377         return sort(m);
378      return m;
379   }
380
381   @SuppressWarnings({
382      "rawtypes", // Raw types necessary for generic object tool operations
383      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this specific logic
384   })
385   private Object toObject(HttpPartType partType, Object o, HttpPartSchema s) throws SerializeException, SchemaValidationException {
386      if (o == null)
387         return null;
388      if (s == null)
389         s = DEFAULT_SCHEMA;
390      ClassMeta cm = getClassMetaForObject(o);
391      HttpPartDataType t = s.getType(cm);
392      HttpPartFormat f = s.getFormat(cm);
393      HttpPartCollectionFormat cf = s.getCollectionFormat();
394
395      if (t == STRING) {
396         if (f == BYTE)
397            return base64Encode(toType(o, CM_ByteArray));
398         if (f == BINARY)
399            return toHex(toType(o, CM_ByteArray));
400         if (f == BINARY_SPACED)
401            return toSpacedHex(toType(o, CM_ByteArray));
402         if (f == DATE)
403            return toIsoDate(toType(o, CM_Calendar));
404         if (f == DATE_TIME)
405            return toIsoDateTime(toType(o, CM_Calendar));
406         return o;
407      } else if (t == ARRAY) {
408         List l = toList(partType, getClassMetaForObject(o), o, s);
409         if (cf == CSV)
410            return StringUtils.joine(l, ',');
411         if (cf == PIPES)
412            return StringUtils.joine(l, '|');
413         if (cf == SSV)
414            return StringUtils.join(l, ' ');
415         if (cf == TSV)
416            return StringUtils.join(l, '\t');
417         return l;
418      } else if (t == OBJECT) {
419         return toMap(partType, getClassMetaForObject(o), o, s);
420      }
421
422      return o;
423   }
424
425   private <T> T toType(Object in, ClassMeta<T> type) throws SerializeException {
426      try {
427         return convertToType(in, type);
428      } catch (InvalidDataConversionException e) {
429         throw new SerializeException(e);
430      }
431   }
432
433   @Override /* Overridden from Serializer */
434   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
435      try {
436         out.getWriter().write(serialize(HttpPartType.BODY, getSchema(), o));
437      } catch (SchemaValidationException e) {
438         throw new SerializeException(e);
439      }
440   }
441}
